title: Signal Rack Output Profile
description: An output profile is not just a label. It defines units, range, clamp behaviour, signal class (continuous/gate/trigger), the AE property type it serializes into, and suggested targets. Profiles are the layer that hides complexity from the user.

label.description: User-facing name shown in the Output Mode dropdown.

signalClass.description: continuous = smooth scalar; gate = sustained 0/1 with threshold; trigger = short pulse on rising edge.

aeType.description: Which AE Expression Control type best serializes this profile. 'slider' is the default because expressions read it most cheaply and pick-whip works everywhere.

clamp.description: Whether the output is hard-clamped to range.

hysteresis.description: Documented but only fully honoured in baked / stateful paths; expression-only gate is a plain threshold.

cooldownFrames.description: Best honoured after bake; expression-only path approximates within the look-back window.
